subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-09-20
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! This is a beautiful and radiant assemblage. It is a merciful gathering
subcodes.subjects: @divine philosophy and natural philosophy, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization, @spiritual transformation, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @religion as source of love and unity, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @knowledge; recognition of God, @proofs for the existence of God
